requirements.title: Even parity (combinational)
requirements.statement: even_par = XOR of all 8 bits of data_in (combinational, no latency).

requirements.title: Registered parity
requirements.statement: par_reg latches even_par on each rising clock edge (1-cycle delay).

requirements.title: Reset clears registered parity
requirements.statement: rst_n=0 clears par_reg to 0 within 1 cycle.
